Explaining  ain't my forte.
Prioritize will unyielding. That is the core of this team. Ghelot dying is fine. Shes meant to soak up damage and die so that Analysis of death can give you barriers. 

The main focus of this team is Alva.

 Get Pandia's ult up as fast as possible and use it on Alva. More Amplification stacks = more damage.

Try getting more barrier stuff, theres this one wheel that gives 3 barrier to lowest hp unit so i’d say whichever character u tend to get exalts faster i’d do that one, try to preserve aigis more and maybe switch the least valuable unit out for a healer.

Take advantage of her 25 shield more? Maybe using the healer to get her back up after would be best. I like using celeste with her since she can barrier and taunt on aigis, then use aigis shield and she’s pretty durable.
